---
title: "Mastering Clinical Data Summaries with {gtsummary}"
author: "Daniel D. Sjoberg, Shannon Pileggi"
footer:  "[R/Medicine 2026 Workshop](https://github.com/ddsjoberg/R-med-2026-gtsummary/)"
logo: "images/gtsummary-logo.png"
editor: source
format: 
  revealjs: 
    theme: slides.scss
    transition: fade
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard: true
execute:
  message: true
  echo: true
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
options(width = 120)
```


{{< include 00-setup.qmd >}}

{{< include 01-background.qmd >}}

{{< include 02-tbl_summary.qmd >}}

{{< include 03-tbl_hierarchicial.qmd >}}

{{< include 04-tbl_merge.qmd >}}

{{< include 05-ard-first.qmd >}}

{{< include 08-print_engines.qmd >}}

{{< include 07-adopt.qmd >}}

<!-- Should I add an LLM section here? -->

{{< include 09-summary.qmd >}}
